welcome.heading: Welcome! 👋
welcome.subtitle: We're glad to have you here. Learn coding in Java easily with fun interactive quizzes tailored just for you!
welcome.nameError: Please enter your name to continue.
welcome.disclaimer: Your name is only used to make your Java learning experience more personal and fun. It is never stored on any server or processed in any way beyond this session.
quiz.dailyLimit.heading: That's all for today, {name}!
quiz.dailyLimit.subtitle: You've completed {limit} exercises today. Come back tomorrow for more!
quiz.allExhausted.heading: Incredible, {name}!
quiz.allExhausted.subtitle: You've seen every available exercise in the last 60 days. Check back later for fresh questions!
quiz.correct.heading: Correct!
quiz.correct.subtitle: Well done, you earned a point!
quiz.wrong.heading: Not quite!
quiz.todayLimit: That's your {limit} for today — see you tomorrow! 🌙
notFound.heading: Page Not Found
notFound.subtitle: Oops! The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
